titleStmt.title: SII 15.143: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 143. (B.K. No. 66 of 1929-30.) TĀḶIKŌṬI, MUDDEBIHAL TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Rāmasvāmi temple.
This is dated the third regnal year of the king, Plava, Vaiśākha śu. 13, Monday, corresponding to 1181 A.D., April 18. The weekday, however was Saturday.

It records a gift of one pon collected from each village in Hagariṭṭage Three Hundred for worship and offerings, etc., to the god Sōmanātha of Tāḷiyakōṭe. The gift was made by Padmarasa-daṇḍanāyaka, the Nāḍadhikāri of Hagariṭṭage Three Hundred, with the approval of his brother-in-law Mahāpradhāna Lakshmīdēva, who was governing the province. Lakshmīdēva is described as Mahāprachaṇḍa-daṇḍanāyaka, Lāḷa-khaṇḍeyakāṟar-adhishṭhāyaka and Aṇuga-sāhaṇādhipati..

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ kā
ḷāṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suva[¨rṇna]vrisabhadhvajaṁ
ḍamarugatū¨ryya ni¨rghōsaṇaṁ kadana
pracaṁḍa subhaṭarāditya nissaṁkamalla
śrīmatu pratāpa kaḷaturiya cakrēsva
raṁ śrīmadāhavamalladēvara vijaya
rājya sikhāmaṇiyenippa śrīmanu mahāpra
dhānaṁ lāḷakhaṁḍeyakāṟaradhiṣṭhāyaka(ṁ)
naṇugasāhaṇādhipati mahāpracaṁḍa daṁḍanā
yakaṁ Arirāyamaṁtrijanabhīkaraṁ śrīlakṣumi
dēvadaṁḍanātha kritayugacaritaṁ parasurā
māvatāradiṁ samastabhūmidānadiṁ sōḍasa
kratugaḷiṁda saptā¨rdhdhalakhkheya dēvabrāhmaṇa
tuṣṭiyaṁ māḍi varaṁbaḍedu lakṣmīni
vāsanenisi sukharājyaṁ gayyutti¨rdda suprastā
vasamayadalu Avara maydunaṁ mahā
pradhānaṁ hagariṭṭada(ge) nāḍadhikāri padmarasa daṁḍa
nāyakaru
biṁnapaṁ geydisalu tāḷiyakōṭeya śrī svayaṁbhu
samastadēvanistārakaṁ śrīpā¨rvvatīmanōvallabhaṁ
maṁdākinīmanōraṁjana sukāruṇyasaṁbhavanappa
śrī sōmanāthadēvaraṁgabhōga naivēdya
naṁdādīvige pātrapāvuḷa caitrapayi
tra dēvālyada vesakke � neya plava saṁvatsarada vaiśākha
su 3 sōmavāradaṁdu dhārayeṟadu hagariṭṭage
300 ṟa grāmānugrāmadalu caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁbaraṁ
salvaṁtāgi pratyēka voṁdūṁdu hoṁnaṁ koṭṭa
ru yiṁtī dha¨rmmamaṁ samasta Arasugaḷu pradhā
na heggaḍe karaṇaṁgaḷuṁ nāḍasamasta prabhu gā
vuṁḍugaḷuṁ svadha¨rmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvaru
© svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharāṁ ṣa
ṣṭi¨rvva¨rṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi
śrī sōmanādhadēvara paḍihaṟa sagaraṁge hiri
ya ma 1
śrī sōmanāthadēvara gāṇake kū
caya Araṇigutiganu
